name: chr2_2p11_2_IGK_VDJ_proximal
description: 2p11.2 immunoglobulin kappa (IGK) light-chain locus and pericentric SD belt. Contains tandem V-kappa gene segments, dispersed orphons and large SD modules shared with other pericentric regions. Somatic V(D)J recombination contracts the locus per B-cell.

architecture.internal_structure: 76 IGKV genes/pseudogenes in tandem at 80-99% identity, 5 IGKJ, single IGKC; flanking SDs and ANKRD20-family duplicons in the pericentric belt.
